aeo_readiness.summary: Rye Construction CO has a basic foundation for AEO but requires improvements in several areas to enhance visibility and search performance.
quick_wins: Implement a Google Business Profile (GBP) to improve local search presence.
Increase the number of online reviews to build trust and improve search rankings.
Optimize website content with targeted keywords related to home remodeling and specific services.

gbp_analysis.summary: No Google Business Profile (GBP) was found for Rye Construction CO, which significantly impacts local search visibility.
critical_issues: Lack of GBP limits local search visibility and customer engagement.
Missing opportunity to showcase reviews, photos, and business information directly in search results.

nap_citations.summary: Inconsistent or missing Name, Address, Phone (NAP) citations across the web may hinder local search performance.
action_items: Ensure consistent NAP information across all online directories and platforms.
Claim and update business listings on major citation sites like Yelp, Bing, and industry-specific directories.
Monitor and manage online citations regularly to maintain accuracy.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of GBP and online reviews
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local search users and potential customers searching for home remodeling services in Arvada and Denver.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Creating and optimizing a GBP and actively managing online reviews.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Establishing the business as a local authority by publishing high-quality, relevant content on the website and engaging with the community through social media and local events.
